architectural_rule: Missions preserve stable aliases. Product model names are replaceable resolutions, not architectural constants.

DEEP.intent: Ambiguous, high-impact, security, or architecture work.

MAX_SINGLE.intent: Exceptionally difficult work that should remain a single task.

PARALLEL.intent: Genuinely separable complex work with an explicit collision plan.

selection_assurance_rule: A resolution is RECOMMENDED_ONLY unless a user confirms it, an adapter observes it, or a launcher technically enforces it.
replacement_rule: Update this policy and generate a new policy fingerprint when product names or availability change. Do not change mission schema enums.
